welcome.title: Welcome to MasterFabric
welcome.subtitle: Modern mobile application development platform
description: Build powerful mobile applications with React Native and Expo
Seamless cross-platform experience on iOS, Android, and Web
Modern tools designed for professional developers

features.title: Powerful Development Tools
features.subtitle: Everything you need for mobile app development
description: Type-safe development with TypeScript for better developer experience
Optimized state management with Zustand + React Query
File-based routing system with Expo Router

collaboration.title: Modern Technologies
collaboration.subtitle: Built with cutting-edge technologies
description: Smooth 60fps animations with React Native Reanimated
Modern UI design with Material Design 3 principles
Offline support with local storage capabilities

ready.title: Ready to Start?
ready.subtitle: Begin your mobile app development journey
description: Dark/light theme support with multi-language application
Comprehensive testing infrastructure with Jest and Testing Library
Code quality standards with ESLint and Prettier

permissionsHelper.title: Permissions Helper
permissionsHelper.statusWorksInExpoGoAndDevBuild: Works in Expo Go, dev build & real device
permissionsHelper.unavailableReasonExpoGo: Not supported in Expo Go (not in its manifest). Use a development build on a real device.
permissionsHelper.unavailableReasonAndroidOnly: This permission is only available on Android.
permissionsHelper.unavailableReasonIosOnly: This permission is only available on iOS.
permissionsHelper.unavailableReasonBluetoothAndroid12: Bluetooth permission requires Android 12 or higher.
permissionsHelper.unavailableReasonExpoModuleRunOnDevice: Requires the corresponding Expo module; run on a real device (not simulator).
permissionsHelper.unavailableReasonNoHardwareOrNotEnrolled: No biometric hardware or no face/fingerprint enrolled in device settings.
permissionsHelper.promptToRequest: Tap Request to show Android or iPhone's native permission dialog (Allow/Block).
permissionsHelper.resetConfirmMessage: To reset all permissions, open Settings and revoke them for this app. Then return here to refresh the status.
permissionsHelper.changePermissionHint: Change in Settings, then tap Refresh.

rationale.camera: This app needs camera access to take photos.
rationale.microphone: This app needs microphone access to record audio.
rationale.photoLibrary: This app needs photos and videos access to select media.
rationale.storage: This app needs storage access to download and upload files.
rationale.location: This app needs location access to show nearby places.
rationale.locationBackground: This app needs background location to track your route.
rationale.calendar: This app needs calendar access to schedule events.
rationale.contacts: We need contacts access to help you share with friends.
rationale.phone: This app needs phone access to identify your device.
rationale.reminders: This app needs reminders access to create and manage your reminders.
rationale.bluetooth: This app needs Bluetooth access to connect to nearby devices.
rationale.notifications: This app would like to send you notifications for updates and reminders.
rationale.biometrics: This app uses Face ID / Touch ID / Biometrics for secure sign-in.
rationale.speechRecognition: This app needs speech recognition access to convert speech to text.
rationale.tracking: This app would like permission to track your activity across apps and websites.
rationale.sms: This app needs SMS access to read or send messages (Android).
rationale.settingsMessage: Permission was denied. Open Settings to enable it.
rationale.deniedOpenSettings: No dialog appeared (common on Xiaomi/Redmi). Open Settings to grant the permission.
rationale.unavailableOpenSettings: Permission could not be requested from the app. Open Settings to enable it manually.

ios.camera: This app needs camera access to take photos and videos.
ios.microphone: This app needs microphone access to record audio.
ios.photoLibrary: This app needs photos and videos access to save and select media.
ios.photoLibraryAdd: This app needs permission to save photos to your library.
ios.locationWhenInUse: This app needs your location to show nearby places.
ios.locationAlways: This app needs your location to track your route.
ios.locationBackground: This app needs background location to track your route.
ios.calendar: This app needs calendar access to schedule events.
ios.contacts: We need contacts access to help you share with friends.
ios.faceId: This app uses Face ID to authenticate securely.
ios.bluetooth: This app needs Bluetooth to connect to nearby devices.

spacing.title: Spacing

errors.numeric: This field must contain only numbers.

errors.fullNameConsecutiveSpaces: Full name must not contain consecutive spaces.
